provenance.source: Hand-authored for toolcall-repair-bench; models a plain factual NL answer where the offered tool is unnecessary and unnamed.

request_tools.name: unit_convert
request_tools.description: Convert a quantity from one unit to another.

raw_output: Water freezes at 0 degrees Celsius and boils at 100 degrees Celsius at standard sea-level pressure. Those two points are what the Celsius scale was originally defined around.
note: The question is a well-known fact requiring no conversion; the offered `unit_convert` tool is not needed and its name never appears, so no_tool is correct.
